panels.name: Total Count
panels.description: Single-number tile: total rows in a chosen table. Default reads the customer table.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Sum Metric
panels.description: Sum of a numeric column across all rows. Default sums the `value` column on the customer table.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Period Change %
panels.description: Week-over-week percent change in row count. Assumes a `created_at` column (ISO date or unix epoch).
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Trend Line
panels.description: Line chart of daily row count over the last 30 days. Swap the table to trend any time-series.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Bar by Category
panels.description: Horizontal bar chart grouped by a category column. Default groups the customer table by `stage`.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Stacked Composition
panels.description: Composition of a total broken down by a grouping column — useful for pipeline mix, channel breakdowns.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Deal Pipeline
panels.description: Sortable table of open deals with customer_id FK for automatic linking.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Task Board
panels.description: Kanban of tasks with customer_id + deal_id FKs for multi-entity linking.
panels.author: OpenHive
